note: seq=78 SUPERSEDED -> benign NOOP. The original seq-78 (Meta-Brain engine deploy) failed its selftest gate because it wrote improve.py to /opt/brain instead of the real package root /opt/atlas/brain; the puller correctly rolled it back. But the flat-queue cursor only advances on a HEALTHY apply (atlas-autopull.v4 line 327), so a failed seq is retried every cycle and blocks all higher seqs. This NOOP lets the cursor advance past 78 cleanly so the corrected engine deploy (seq-79, right paths) can apply. No state change; standard restore-point + health-check still run and pass.

steps.note: seq=78 superseded by seq-79 (corrected /opt/atlas/brain paths). Intentional no-op to advance the cursor past the rolled-back seq. The real engine deploy is seq-79.
